creator: wen@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #23)

converters/osm2pgsql, graphics/libgeotiff and databases/spatialite had been fixed before, it is my fault to forget to included the patch to previous patch. I submitted the revised patch just now.

I did not patch postgis21 since it was marked DEPRECATED and should be removed soon.

wen
